ddls:
CREATE TABLE "centrifuges" (
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each centrifuge model */,
  "centrifuge_type" TEXT /* Type of the centrifuge model (e.g., H 630 P) */,
  "basket_diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the basket in millimeters */,
  "basket_depth_mm" REAL /* Depth of the basket in millimeters */,
  "filtering_surface_area_m2" REAL /* Filtering surface area in square meters */,
  "nominal_volume_l" REAL /* Nominal volume in liters */,
  "filling_weight_max_kg" REAL /* Maximum filling weight in kilograms */,
  "speed_max_1min" REAL /* Maximum speed in rotations per minute */,
  "spinning_speed_x_g" REAL /* Spinning speed expressed in g-force */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range in Celsius */,
  "power_consumption_w" INTEGER /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "noise_level_db" REAL /* Noise level in decibels */,
  "warranty_period_months" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the category of the centrifuge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("centrifuge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centrifuges_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the centrifuge model */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in stock */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Total quantity sold */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which new stock needs to be ordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when inventory level falls below reorder level */,
  "last_inventory_update" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_centrifuge_id FOREIGN KEY ("centrifuge_id") REFERENCES centrifuges ("centrifuge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the centrifuge sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold in this transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_info" TEXT /* Information about the customer */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price per unit sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied (if any) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_centrifuge_id FOREIGN KEY ("centrifuge_id") REFERENCES centrifuges ("centrifuge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the centrifuge model produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "quantity_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity produced in this batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Total cost of production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_centrifuge_id FOREIGN KEY ("centrifuge_id") REFERENCES centrifuges ("centrifuge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user in the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, engineering) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the centrifuge model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., High-Speed, Low-Speed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the centrifuge model using this component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing this component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "quantity_needed" INTEGER /* Quantity of component needed for production */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_centrifuge_id FOREIGN KEY ("centrifuge_id") REFERENCES centrifuges ("centrifuge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "centrifuge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the centrifuge that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of maintenance activities */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_centrifuge_id FOREIGN KEY ("centrifuge_id") REFERENCES centrifuges ("centrifuge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, technician) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low inventory, maintenance required) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data update) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
